2026-06-30PMOOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a puisne Judge of the Supreme Court of CanadaAppointment of the Honourable Glenn D. Joyal, Chief Justice of the Court of King's Bench of Manitoba, to be a puisne Judge of the Supreme Court of Canada.N/A
subject: Appointment of a puisne Judge of the Supreme Court of Canada
precis: Appointment of the Honourable Glenn D. Joyal, Chief Justice of the Court of King's Bench of Manitoba, to be a puisne Judge of the Supreme Court of Canada.
